title: WebAuthn & Passkeys
description: Architect phishing-resistant biometric authentication journeys using WebAuthn and Passkeys. Manage the multi-device lifecycle of FIDO2 credentials to replace legacy password-based systems. Implement WebAuthn to enhance the security of user authentication processes.
objectives: Architect phishing-resistant biometric authentication journeys using WebAuthn and Passkeys.
Manage the multi-device lifecycle of FIDO2 credentials to replace legacy password-based systems.
Implement WebAuthn to enhance the security of user authentication processes.
